name: Episode 1
overview: Writer Minori meets Kazuko, the TV fortune teller who coined "You'll go to hell!", and starts digging into the dark rumors behind her sensational rise.

name: Episode 2
overview: Unwilling to be used any longer, Kazuko starts her own business and soon makes enough to open a club in Tokyo's most glamorous district, Ginza.

name: Episode 3
overview: Kazuko finds herself trapped and stifled in a traditional marriage. Back in Tokyo, her booming business grows — and the yakuza come knocking.

name: Episode 4
overview: With Tokyo riding Olympic fever and her clubs thriving, Kazuko is swept up by Sudo's charm and makes an impulsive decision. But what will it cost her?

name: Episode 5
overview: In the present, Minori confronts Kazuko about shady sales tactics and gets a sobering lesson. Back in 1970, Kazuko sinks deeper into violence and fear.

name: Episode 6
overview: The 1973 oil crisis squeezes Kazuko's club, but a fateful meeting with a fortune teller changes her outlook. It's time to try something new.

name: Episode 7
overview: Kazuko weaves a touching story about saving Chiyoko Shimakura's life and career, but a figure from her past unveils another side to the tale.

name: Episode 8
overview: After a soul-crushing betrayal, Kazuko reinvents herself as a fortune teller and uses her connections to build a media empire — and hunger for more.

name: Last Episode
overview: Faced with new truths, Minori chases the reality behind Kazuko's self-made myth, but her subject keeps meddling. What final story will she choose to tell?
